feed.title: BillingWatch Blog — Stripe Billing & SaaS Revenue Operations
feed.subtitle: Practical posts on Stripe billing bugs, webhook anomaly detection, and SaaS revenue operations.

entry.title: Stripe Billing Bugs That Cost SaaS Companies Thousands
entry.summary: Five billing bugs that show up repeatedly in Stripe-powered SaaS companies — phantom subscriptions, price drift, duplicate charges, failed payment cascades, and usage metering gaps. What they cost in real dollars and how to catch them automatically with BillingWatch.
entry.content:
Billing bugs are the silent revenue killers in SaaS. They're often invisible — no alarms go off, no dashboards light up red — but their impact accumulates fast: lost revenue, chargebacks, frustrated customers.

This post covers five billing bugs that show up repeatedly in Stripe-powered SaaS companies, why they happen, and how much they actually cost — plus how BillingWatch catches them automatically.

Read the full post →
